change_summary: Increase the height of the structure subsystem by 1 meter

cascade_issues.title: Thermal gradient margin violation
cascade_issues.description: Increasing the height of the structure will increase thermal gradients across the optical bench, potentially exceeding the ΔT limit of 15°C.

cascade_issues.title: Missing shock test evidence
cascade_issues.description: The change may affect the structural dynamics, necessitating a new shock response analysis and testing to ensure compliance with launcher SRS ICD.

cascade_issues.title: Potential data processing latency increase
cascade_issues.description: The additional height may introduce more signal delay in the data processing pipeline, potentially affecting end-to-end latency requirements.

missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD
missing_tests.reason: The structural change may affect the shock response characteristics, necessitating a new shock test.
